mapper.select: SELECT c.center_id AS centerId, c.center_name AS centerName, c.center_content AS centerContent, c.center_region AS centerRegion, c.latitude, c.longitude, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.space, c.facility, c.notice, st.category AS category, st.base_fee AS baseFee, COUNT(DISTINCT cr.account_id) AS reviewCount, ROUND(AVG(cr.grade), 1) AS avgGrade FROM centers c LEFT JOIN rooms r ON c.center_id = r.center_id LEFT JOIN sports_type st ON r.sport_id = st.sport_id LEFT JOIN centers_reviews cr ON c.center_id = cr.center_id WHERE c.center_id = #{centerId} GROUP BY c.center_id, c.center_name, c.center_content, c.center_region, c.latitude, c.longitude, c.created_at, c.space, c.facility, c.notice, st.category, st.base_fee

SELECT a.amenity_text FROM rooms r JOIN rooms_amenities_links ral ON r.room_id = ral.room_id JOIN amenities a ON ral.amenity_id = a.amenity_id WHERE r.center_id = #{centerId} GROUP BY a.amenity_text ORDER BY a.amenity_text

SELECT cr.center_id AS centerId, cr.account_id AS accountId, a.name AS accountName, cr.grade, cr.content, cr.created_at AS createdAt, cr.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM centers_reviews cr JOIN accounts a ON cr.account_id = a.account_id WHERE cr.center_id = #{centerId} ORDER BY cr.created_at DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.*, ROWNUM RN FROM ( SELECT cr.center_id AS centerId, cr.account_id AS accountId, v.nickname AS accountName, v.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, v.hati_code AS hatiCode, v.gender AS gender, cr.grade, cr.content, cr.created_at AS createdAt, cr.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM centers_reviews cr LEFT JOIN vw_account_display v ON cr.account_id = v.account_id WHERE cr.center_id = #{centerId} ORDER BY cr.created_at DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{pageSize} ) WHERE RN > #{offset}

SELECT temperature, humidity FROM ( SELECT rer.temperature, rer.humidity, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY rer.measured_at DESC) AS rn FROM room_env_reading rer JOIN rooms r ON rer.room_id = r.room_id WHERE r.center_id = #{centerId} ) sub WHERE rn = 1

SELECT slot_id AS slotId, room_id AS roomId, slot_date AS slotDate, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, status, hold_until AS holdUntil, updated_at AS updatedAt, TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(start_time, 'HH24')) AS hour, CASE WHEN status = 'AVAILABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS available FROM room_slots WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND TRUNC(slot_date) = TO_DATE(#{slotDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND status IN ('AVAILABLE', 'HOLD') ORDER BY start_time

SELECT v.nickname AS displayName, v.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, v.hati_code AS hatiCode, up.gender AS gender, a.role_type AS roleType FROM accounts a LEFT JOIN vw_account_display v ON a.account_id = v.account_id LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON a.account_id = up.account_id WHERE a.account_id = #{accountId}

SELECT product_id AS productId, account_id AS trainerAccountId, sport_id AS sportId, total_count AS totalCount, price, base_fee AS baseFee FROM trainer_pass_product WHERE account_id = #{trainerId} AND sport_id = #{sportId} ORDER BY total_count

SELECT a.account_id AS "accountId", v.nickname AS "nickname", v.handle AS "handle", v.hati_code AS "hatiCode", v.gender AS "gender", v.profile_image_url AS "profileImageUrl", a.role_type AS "roleType" FROM accounts a JOIN vw_account_display v ON a.account_id = v.account_id JOIN user_profile up ON a.account_id = up.account_id WHERE up.nickname = #{nickname} AND up.handle = '@' || #{handle} AND a.role_type = 'USER' AND a.status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT pass_id AS passId, remaining_count AS remainingCount FROM ( SELECT pass_id, remaining_count FROM user_pass WHERE account_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND remaining_count > 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
